rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PETER MON YU HUNG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/10/18. Prior tentative ruling has not been complied with. As this petition was filed on 7/27/18 and requested a 3 month extension to administer estate, and as 3 months have already passed, a NEW petition for final distribution / petition to approve further status of administration will need to be filed 1 week prior continuance hearing date, or an appearance will be required.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF DONALD M. WILSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Payment Of Fees To Litigation Counsel And For Additional Authority To Incur Litigation Fees
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. Counsel may be asked to address where they are in the litigation, and to address costs, which appear high - 4/30 $169 for filing a notice of hearing in decedents estate or trust, which is subject to efiling, two costs on 5/31 for filing notice of hearings, one in a conservatorship and one for efiling.
